## Summary

Describe the public docs, examples, or materials changed.

## Checks

- [ ] Local links checked
- [ ] Docs framework preview/build checked
- [ ] Example syntax checked when examples changed
- [ ] No credentials, account data, billing data, or private readbacks
- [ ] No ranking, traffic, or AI citation success claim without current evidence
- [ ] Discovery inclusion is not described as gateway availability
- [ ] OpenAPI/MCP/API route shapes match current public runtime docs

## Public Sources

List public sources or source-map entries used for factual claims.
